title: age-group — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Safeguarding-adjacent events (bounds, cutoff, sport_key, default) fan out to the audit + notifications + downstream Team/AthleteEnrollment modules; lifecycle events (archived, restored, deleted) fan out to notifications + the tenant admin activity feed.

events.name: AgeGroupCreated
events.trigger: AgeGroupProvisioner completed successfully. Fires exactly once per (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key, slug) tuple. Emits for both seeded defaults + tenant customs; consumers may filter on `source` in the payload to distinguish.
consumers: notifications::MaybeDispatchAgeGroupCreatedNotification (skipped for source='tenant_provisioning' — seeded defaults are silent)
teams::InvalidateAgeGroupPickerCache (Wave 2b — Team edit form caches allowed age groups)

payload.name: string
payload.created_by: ULID (usr_*) | null (null = system-provisioned by the seeder)

events.name: AgeGroupUpdated
events.trigger: Any AgeGroup field mutated except the four dedicated events (bounds, cutoff, sport_key, default). Fires for renames, description edits, color changes, gender_category edits, sort_order.

events.name: AgeGroupBoundsChanged
events.trigger: min_age_inclusive OR max_age_inclusive mutated. Audit-CRITICAL — bounds changes may invalidate the eligibility of every Athlete currently enrolled in a Team that references this AgeGroup. Fires alongside AgeGroupUpdated (which does NOT include bounds).
consumers: teams::MaybeInvalidateTeamRoster (Wave 2b — recomputes eligibility flags for every athlete in every referring team)
athlete-enrollment::MaybeInvalidateEnrollment (Wave 3+ — flags enrollments where the Athlete's current age no longer fits)

payload.is_youth_flip: boolean (true when max_age crossing 18 caused is_youth to flip)

events.name: AgeGroupCutoffChanged
events.trigger: cutoff_date_kind OR cutoff_month OR cutoff_day mutated. Audit-CRITICAL for the same reasoning as AgeGroupBoundsChanged — changing how age is calculated may reshape eligibility outcomes without touching the bounds themselves. (Example: switching from calendar_year to rolling_from_birthday on the same U12 group re-scores every borderline athlete.)

events.name: AgeGroupSportKeyChanged
events.trigger: sport_key mutated (including null → non-null and non-null → null). Audit-warn severity — the sport-specific override chain reshapes on this change; downstream resolvers switch their answers.

events.name: AgeGroupDefaultChanged
events.trigger: The is_default flag flipped within a (tenant_id, organization_id, sport_key) tuple. Fires with the previous default's ID + the new default's ID. Downstream tier-pricing defaults (Finance Wave 4) key off this flag.

payload.from_age_group_id: ULID | null (null when this is the first default — AgeGroupCatalogSeeded fires that path)

events.name: AgeGroupArchived
events.trigger: AgeGroup soft-deleted (deleted_at set). Refused when is_default=true (observer catches it). Refused when is_seeded=true (seeded defaults cannot be deleted). Refused when any inbound row (Team, AthleteEnrollment via non-snapshot column, EventDivision) still references this AgeGroup (AGE_GROUP_IN_USE). Archived AgeGroups vanish from selectors but existing rows stay valid.

events.name: AgeGroupRestored
events.trigger: Archived AgeGroup transitioned back to active (deleted_at cleared). Restoration allowed within the 1095-day (3-year) retention window before PurgeArchivedAgeGroupsJob hard-deletes it.

events.name: AgeGroupDeleted
events.trigger: AgeGroup soft-deleted OR hard-deleted. Distinct events not needed — the payload carries the mode.

events.name: AgeGroupCatalogSeeded
events.trigger: SeedDefaultAgeGroupsForTenantJob completed for a freshly-provisioned tenant. Fires exactly once per tenant lifetime (unless the tenant loses every default + the reconciler re-seeds — that path fires a fresh event).

payload.catalog_version: integer (bumps when data/default-age-groups.json changes; consumers may compare vs their cached copy)
